examples: The crisis has led to the closure of a number of nonessential government services.
About 9% attempted to conceal "nonessential Internet use", and nearly 4% reported feeling "preoccupied by the Internet when offline".
Nonessential travel to and from these countries has also been reduced significantly over the past six months.
An austere government is strictly frugal and avoids spending on programs that are viewed as nonessential.
